protocol.name: gamescope_scanout

description.summary: Direct scanout buffer export for streaming

protocol.description: Exports gamescope's composited output frames as DMA-BUF descriptors without re-compositing. Designed for low-overhead game streaming.

interface.name: gamescope_scanout

description.summary: Direct scanout buffer export for streaming

interface.description: Exports gamescope's composited output frames as DMA-BUF descriptors without re-compositing. Designed for low-overhead game streaming.

entry.name: prefer_hdr
entry.summary: Client prefers HDR output if available

request.name: subscribe
request.description: Begin receiving frame events. max_fps=0 means unlimited (match display).

request.name: release_buffer

description.summary: Signal that client is done reading a buffer

request.description: Must be sent after the client finishes reading/encoding each frame. Gamescope will not render into a buffer until it is released.

event.name: frame
event.description: Followed by one or more 'plane' events, then 'frame_done'.

event.name: plane
event.description: One per plane. Sent between 'frame' and 'frame_done'.

description.summary: All planes for this frame have been sent
HDR metadata (CTA-861.G). Only sent on change.
